note: This locally reviewed fixture proves graph materialization and atomic approval. It is not represented as a provider response.

proposal.title: Protect order-details PII before analytics consumption
proposal.summary: Add reusable profiling and impact evidence, then gate a deterministic masking step with Human Review.
proposal.rationale: DataHub reports 12 PII fields and downstream propagation across 18 datasets. The direct source-to-output path must be replaced by a reviewed protected path.
proposal.writeback: After approval, record the masking decision and affected lineage in DataHub.
evidence: get_entities resolved the order_details dbt dataset.
list_schema_fields found 40 fields and 12 PII classifications.
get_lineage observed 18 downstream datasets across five platforms.

actions.label: Order details profile
actions.description: Reusable bounded profile: 40 fields, 12 PII fields, no raw rows, evidence captured from DataHub MCP.
actions.reason: Retain compact schema and classification memory instead of repeatedly reconstructing the dataset.

actions.label: Order details impact radius
actions.description: Atomic replayable impact snapshot covering 18 downstream datasets across Snowflake, dbt, Looker, Power BI and Tableau.
actions.rule: risk=high; affected_datasets=18; action=protect PII before analytics output
actions.reason: Make the downstream risk explicit and replayable from the captured lineage evidence.

actions.label: Mask order PII
actions.description: Tokenize customer identifiers and redact direct contact fields before downstream analytics consumption.
actions.reason: Remove the unprotected sensitive-data path detected by atomic validation.

actions.label: Review order PII contract
actions.description: A data steward must approve the exact masking contract before the analytics output can continue.
actions.rule: approve exact transform, downstream impact and DataHub writeback
actions.reason: The proposal changes sensitive fields and downstream contracts.
Start with the captured impact boundary.
Apply the correction supported by the impact evidence.
Require review after defining the exact protection contract.
Allow the output only after explicit approval.

review.reason: The candidate removes the direct PII path and preserves a connected, review-gated lineage.
